seo.title: Cookie policy | Alfora
seo.description: Information about cookies and local storage used by Alfora.

page.title: Cookie policy
page.description: Learn which storage technologies Alfora may use and how you can manage them.

legal.whatText: Cookies and similar technologies allow small pieces of data to be stored on a device to remember preferences and enable certain functions.
legal.essentialText: Alfora may use local storage or essential cookies to remember the selected language, maintain interface preferences and apply settings required for operation.
legal.analyticsText: Hosting, analytics, embedded content, security or donation providers may use their own cookies according to their policies.
legal.controlText: Users can block or delete cookies through their browser settings. Some preferences may no longer be remembered.
legal.changesText: This policy may be updated when technologies and services are added or removed.
